tool_purpose: A pre-trained image feature vector model using MobileNetV2 architecture on TensorFlow Hub. It generates feature vectors from input images for various applications like image classification, object detection, and image similarity. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Generate feature vectors from images. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/google/tf2-preview/mobilenet_v2/feature_vector/4').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: A pre-trained image feature vector model using MobileNetV2 architecture on TensorFlow Hub.
